item.title: BlinkDL / RWKV-LM
item.description:
Desc: RWKV is a RNN with transformer-level LLM performance. It can be directly trained like a GPT (parallelizable). So it's combining the best of RNN and transformer - great performance, fast inference, saves VRAM, fast training, "infinite" ctx_len, and free sentence embedding.
Lang: Python
Star: 1425
